title: Plutonium
body:
**NONE OF THESE MODS ARE MINE - I ONLY COMPILE THEM IN THIS MODPACK**

Plutonium is a modpack made for Crystal PvP and to make it as easy to play as possible.
It has many performance mods and HUD mods like uku's Armour Hud.
Features include ->
- Upgraded Performance (Sodium)
- Turn off Crystal Particles (Sodium Extras)
- See your Armour Durability without opening your inventory
- Use CIT Textures
- Totems are Tweaked in ways
- Marlow's Crystal Optimiser (MAY NOT BE ALLOWED ON SOME SERVERS)
- Hero's Anchor Optimiser (MAY NOT BE ALLOWED ON SOME SERVERS)
